questionHtml:
What distinguishes movement from locomotion?


A.  It allows migrations

B.  It occurs in all organisms.

C.  It requires ATP.

D.  It causes the displacement of individuals.

meta.title: What distinguishes movement from locomotion? A. It allows migrations B. It occurs in all organisms. C. It requires ATP. D. It causes the displacement of individuals.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.3.1. Adaptations for movement as a universal feature of living organisms
